div.p: Fundamental unit of data transfer between memory hierarchy levels
Tag Bits Identifies which memory block this cache line represents
Valid Bit 1 = contains valid data 0 = line is invalid/empty
Dirty Bit 1 = modified, needs write-back 0 = clean, matches memory
MESI State Modified/Exclusive/Shared/Invalid Coherence protocol state
LRU Bits For replacement policy Tracks access recency
